title: Executive Awards

products.title: High Gloss Rosewood Book Award with Black Gold Border Plates
products.displayName: High Gloss Rosewood Book Award with Black Gold Border Plates
products.description: This beautiful Airflyte Premium High Gloss Rosewood Book Award offers two large areas for personalization with one gold border black LaserFX plate on each side. This makes a unique gift or award that's east to display and appropriate for any event or occasion!
products.imageAlt: High Gloss Rosewood Book Award with Black Gold Border Plates

products.title: 5 3/8" x 4 1/4" High Gloss Rosewood Book Award with Two Full Color Plates
products.displayName: 5 3/8" x 4 1/4" High Gloss Rosewood Book Award with Two Full Color Plates
products.description: This beautiful Airflyte Premium High Gloss Rosewood Book Award offers two large areas for full color personalization with one plate on each side. Use photographs or other graphics to create a gift or award that's easy to display and appropriate for any event or occasion!
products.imageAlt: 5 3/8" x 4 1/4" High Gloss Rosewood Book Award with Two Full Color Plates
